summary: Iteration 130 testing complete. TASK 1 (IndustryOnboarding), TASK 3 (Emails This Week stat), and TASK 4 (Font preloads) verified successfully. TASK 2 (step body character counter) verified via code review. CRITICAL BUG: Backend onboarding fails for 'DESIGN' industry - Prisma schema IndustryType enum does not include 'DESIGN'.

critical.issue: Prisma validation error: 'DESIGN' is not a valid IndustryType enum value. Backend auth.ts line 127 includes 'DESIGN' in validIndustries but Prisma schema only has: PHOTOGRAPHY, VIDEOGRAPHY, GRAPHIC_DESIGN, WEB_DESIGN, ILLUSTRATION, FINE_ART, SCULPTURE, BRANDING, CONTENT_CREATION, OTHER
critical.error_message: Invalid value for argument `primaryIndustry`. Expected IndustryType.
critical.fix_required: Add 'DESIGN' to Prisma schema IndustryType enum OR change frontend to use 'GRAPHIC_DESIGN' instead of 'DESIGN'

integration_issues.issue: Selecting 'Design' and clicking Continue fails silently due to backend Prisma validation error

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Prisma schema mismatch - add 'DESIGN' to IndustryType enum in prisma/schema.prisma and run prisma generate
Alternative: Change IndustryOnboarding.tsx to use 'GRAPHIC_DESIGN' instead of 'DESIGN' to match existing enum
critical_code_review_comments: IndustryOnboarding.tsx uses 'DESIGN' as type but Prisma IndustryType enum only has 'GRAPHIC_DESIGN' - schema mismatch causes onboarding failure
Backend auth.ts line 127 validIndustries includes 'DESIGN' but Prisma will reject it at database level

success_rate.backend: Onboarding API fails for DESIGN industry (Prisma validation)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - UI renders correctly, 3 industry cards with examples text

context_for_next_testing_agent: Prisma schema needs 'DESIGN' added to IndustryType enum. After fix, retest onboarding flow with Design selection.

backend_design_industry.prisma_accepts_DESIGN: ✗ FAIL - Prisma IndustryType enum does NOT include 'DESIGN'

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Schema mismatch between backend validation (auth.ts) and Prisma schema (schema.prisma). Backend auth.ts was updated to accept 'DESIGN' in validIndustries array, but Prisma IndustryType enum was not updated to include 'DESIGN'.
reproduction_steps: 4. Backend returns 500 error with Prisma validation failure
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add 'DESIGN' to IndustryType enum in prisma/schema.prisma: enum IndustryType { PHOTOGRAPHY VIDEOGRAPHY GRAPHIC_DESIGN WEB_DESIGN ILLUSTRATION FINE_ART SCULPTURE BRANDING CONTENT_CREATION DESIGN OTHER } then run: npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push
